resources.string: Could not load player data. Please restart the app.
You already have an active session. Complete or abandon it first.
This crop is not ready yet.
You already have an active quest.
You don\'t meet the requirements for this quest.
Your combat level is too low for this dungeon.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
All progress from this session will be lost.
Start a skill session and watch your character grow. Sessions run for one hour, even when the app is closed.
Tap any skill to get started.
Show an alert when your session completes
Disable battery optimization for Idle Fantasy to receive timely session alerts
Head to Skills or Combat to start training.
Choose between a sidebar rail or top tabs
Show Recent Activity button in the home screen header
Each daily quest rewards coins. Every quest also has a 1 in 100 chance to drop a piece of Dwarven gear.
Each weekly challenge rewards coins based on its level requirement. Complete all 5 to earn a bonus: 100,000 coins, or a 1 in 26 chance at a piece of Divine gear.
Idle Fantasy is free and open source software.
Erase all skills, items, quests, and coins
This will erase all skill XP, items, coins, and quest progress. This cannot be undone.
Everything will be lost. You will start over from scratch.
For the best experience, allow Idle Fantasy to run in the background so you receive timely session notifications.
You dig deeper into the earth…
Save your progress to a file
Visit the shop, inn, guild, church, builder\'s workshop, slayer master, and carnival
Do dailies to increase your reputation
Complete quests to advance your rank
You died and lost most of your gains.
No spells available at your magic level.

string-array.name: profile_pet_happy_messages
string-array.item: %1$s promises to keep working hard for you.

resources.string: Level %1$d • Bury bones or scatter ashes for Prayer XP
No bones or ashes in inventory
No Rune Essence in inventory — mine some first
Remove the crop without any reward?
Tap any skill and start a training session. Sessions run in the background, even with the app closed. Come back to collect your loot and XP.

Mine ore to smelt bars, then forge better weapons and armour. Equip stronger gear to tackle harder dungeons and bosses. Better tools speed up gathering, and higher-tier equipment unlocks content that weaker gear can\'t survive.
Complete quests to earn XP rewards. Rare pets can drop while training skills and provide permanent XP boosts.
An idle RPG inspired by classic MMORPGs. Train skills, fight dungeons, and craft gear. All offline, no accounts, no ads.
Hire a worker to train skills for you, or buy food from the daily menu. Workers do not count toward your quests.
One job per hire, dismissed after collecting. 8h gathering, 0.5x efficiency, unlimited crafting qty. He\'s slow, but he\'ll do anything.
8h gathering, 1x efficiency. Crafting, prayer, and runecrafting capped at 480 items per session.
6h gathering, 1.25x efficiency. Crafting, prayer, and runecrafting capped at 360 items per session.
4h gathering, 2x efficiency. Crafting, prayer, and runecrafting capped at 240 items per session.
Gathering: session hours x efficiency multiplier applied to loot and XP
Crafting/prayer/runecrafting: quantity capped per tier; Long Laborer has no cap
Worker is idle — queued sessions start automatically
The active session and queue will be cancelled. Your hire fee and any queued materials will be returned.
Reach the maximum combat level of 113
Worker is idle — no sessions queued
Join guilds and earn rep rewards

Guilds reward you for activities you already do. Complete quests and daily requests to earn cross-skill materials, coins, and XP, so specialists can still access resources from skills they don\'t train.
Complete guild quests to earn reputation and unlock daily requests.
Earn %1$s coins via trade routes for the %2$s.
Blessings for XP, defense, and coins
No active blessing — visit the Church to pray.
Are you sure you want to deactivate your active blessing? You will not get your bones back.
A long-abandoned mine beneath the foothills. Its copper veins still glitter in the dark.
The deepest level of an ancient dwarven excavation. Rich veins of rare metal hide behind the bones of its builders.
A primeval forest where the trees have grown for thousands of years undisturbed. Something speaks between the branches.
A forest where shadow has replaced sunlight. The trees bleed black sap and the air tastes of old magic.
A sea cave carved by centuries of tides. Strange stone pillars rise from the water.
A still black lagoon with no visible bottom. The fish here glow faintly and dissolve within minutes of being caught.
A decrepit stone tower perched at the edge of the foothills. Something still guards what was once stored inside.
The remains of a wizard\'s tower reduced to a field of rubble. The air still crackles with residual magic.
Find all notes in %1$s to unlock
Receive tasks from the Slayer Master in Town.
Upgrade the Inn, Guild Hall, and Church
Complete tasks to earn Slayer XP and points. Spend points in the shop for exclusive gear.
No active task. Tap Get New Task.
This enemy is only found in an Expeditions dungeon you haven\'t discovered yet. Reroll for free.
No eligible tasks at your Slayer level.
Task complete! Visit the Slayer Master for a new one.
Pre-assign upcoming Slayer tasks by paying bones. They are assigned automatically when your current task is completed.
Your %1$s level will reset to 1, but you\'ll earn a permanent +%2$d%% XP bonus for this skill.
Your %1$s level will reset to 1, but you\'ll earn a permanent +%2$d bonus to your stats.
Prestige any skill for the first time
Prestige all skills at least once
A sturdy helm worn by veteran slayers.
A whip forged from abyssal energy. Excellent for strength training.
Heavy armour etched with slayer runes.
Protective legs crafted for extended dungeon runs.
Trade common goods at the local market. Returns are modest but variable.
Move goods along the river trade route. Profits are unpredictable but often worthwhile.
Join a merchant caravan heading east. The long journey pays well when the deal goes through.
Trade at the legendary Grand Exchange where fortunes are made and lost.
Trade rare commodities in the prestigious merchant district.
Sail precious cargo to the northern port cities. High risk, high reward.
Select a bone to bury at the altar
Build furniture using planks and nails to gain XP. Higher Construction levels let you upgrade the town\'s buildings for permanent bonuses.
Pickpocket NPCs each session. Success chance depends on your level vs the target. Failed attempts stun you for a frame. Higher tiers drop rare items and large coin purses.
Upgrade to grant workers an XP bonus
Unlocks Pick-a-Cup, cooldowns reduced to 7.5 minutes, +5% idle ticket chance
Unlocks Higher or Lower, +10% idle ticket chance
Cooldowns reduced to 5 minutes, +15% idle ticket chance
Upgrade any town building for the first time
Upgrade all five town buildings to at least Tier 1
Upgrade any single town building to the maximum tier
Upgrade all five town buildings to the maximum tier
Clear your first Infinite Tower floor
Reach floor 10 in the Infinite Tower
Reach floor 50 in the Infinite Tower
Reach floor 100 in the Infinite Tower
Reach floor 250 in the Infinite Tower
A labyrinth of tunnels beneath the city streets, used by an organised ring of thieves.
A hidden vault beneath the Rogue Sanctum where the guild\'s most valuable stolen goods are kept.
The guild\'s inner refuge, accessible only to proven members.
The innermost sanctum of the thieves\' guild, guarded by its most elite enforcers.
A ring bearing the seal of the Guild of Shadows. Only the guild\'s most dangerous operatives ever wore one.
A tear in reality where void creatures spill into the mortal world.
An ancient fortress encased in a glacier, its defenders frozen in eternal vigil.
The deepest point in the known world, ruled by void lords since the dawn of time.
A blade forged from crystallised void energy. Its edge cuts through armour as if it were cloth.
The crown of the Void Sovereign itself, radiating dark majesty. Offers unparalleled protection.
A pendant of pure void essence. Enhances all combat stats of the wearer.
Queue a session to earn tickets. A higher relevant skill level means more tickets per session.
Shoot at moving targets. Ranged level boosts ticket yield.
Lift stones and swing hammers. Strength level boosts ticket yield.
Cast illusion spells against rival mages. Magic level boosts ticket yield.
Catch the biggest fish in the carnival pond. Fishing level boosts ticket yield.
Time your throw when the indicator hits the golden target zone.
Strike when the power meter is at its peak for maximum score.
Watch the potion colours and tap them back in the same order.
Which item is worth more in the open market?
Wrong! The more valuable item was %1$s.
Watch which cup hides the gem, then pick it after the shuffle!
Watch carefully — gem is under cup %1$d
Wrong! The gem was under cup %1$d.
Upgrade the Fairgrounds to Tier 1 to unlock
Guess whether the next number will be higher or lower than the current one.
Upgrade the Fairgrounds to Tier 2 to unlock
A tiny sprout has pushed through the soil.
The stalk is growing at an unnatural pace.
The leaves are enormous — unlike anything you\'ve seen before.
Clouds have begun to gather around the upper stalk…
Strange sounds drift down from somewhere far above.
Distant rumbling. Something stirs in the heights.
The beanstalk shudders. Something awaits at the top.
Almost there. The air grows thin. You can nearly see the top.
The beanstalk reaches beyond the clouds. Ready to climb?
You have climbed the beanstalk. Something awaits…
Magic Beans can only be planted in one plot
Daily quest complete! You found dwarven gear!
All weekly challenges complete! You found divine gear!
You have no food equipped. Without food you may die quickly and lose most of your rewards. Start anyway?
The legendary three-headed dragon, feared across the realm.
An ancient demon from the abyss, master of dark magic.
The terror of the deep seas, a colossal sea monster.
An ancient demon of flame and shadow, awakened from its slumber deep beneath the earth.
The primordial entity behind the void rifts. Ancient beyond reckoning, it regards mortal challengers with contempt.
You fell on floor %d. Resetting to floor 1.
Endless floors. How far can you climb?
Open the Tower screen to collect this run
